WARNING: These fault patterns are for A2780 (820-02652) ONLY. Component designators are board-specific.

faults.name: Port Controller (UF400/UF500) failure
faults.fix: Replace UF400 or UF500. Check DF400/DF500 fuses.
faults.a2780_notes: A2780 uses CD3217 port controllers with PP3V3_UPC0_LDO and PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE internal LDOs.

faults.name: PP3V8_AON short
faults.fix: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON distribution. Thermal cam. Check U5700 SVR AON.
faults.a2780_notes: U5700 SVR AON on pages 57-58. Check PPVAON_PWR_EN enable path.

faults.name: Austringer VR failure
faults.fix: Check Austringer phases U9300-U9620 (pages 94-96). Measure PP1V8_S1_CLVR_VDDH. Check P1V8VDDH_DRMOS_EN and FAULT_L signals.
faults.a2780_notes: A2780 uses Austringer VR (NOT Viper). 5-phase DrMOS design. Fed from PP3V8_AON via support on page 92.

faults.name: CLVR module failure
faults.fix: Check each CLVR output. UA100 (PCPU), UA200 (GPU1/2), UA300 (GPU0/3), UA500 (ANE/AFR). Pages 101-105.
faults.a2780_notes: A2780 uses 5 Mirabeau CLVR modules (NOT Monaco VR). CLVR strap configuration differs between C/D and S variants (page 120).

faults.name: PP5V_S2 fault
faults.fix: Check UC260 TPS62130 on page 122. Measure output (expected 5.15V). Check P5VS2TPS_PWR_EN.
faults.a2780_notes: UC260 on page 122 with QC280 discharge MOSFET.

faults.name: USB-C 5V regulator fault
faults.fix: Check UF800 (LT8642-1, page 158). Check UPC01_5V_EN and PMU_SYS_ALIVE signals.
faults.a2780_notes: A2780 uses LT8642-1 (UF800) for USB-C 5V, with SN74AUP1G08 (UF840) AND gate for enable logic.

faults.name: MACAW retimer failure

symptoms.dcps_20v: USB data failures, intermittent USB disconnects

faults.fix: Check UF600/UF650 (CYUSB2405A2, page 156). Check I2C buses and reset lines.
faults.a2780_notes: A2780 uses MACAW retimers (CYUSB2405A2), not earlier repeater designs.
